projects.description: Developed a RESTful backend using Spring Boot with a layered architecture (Controller, Service, Repository). Built CRUD APIs to manage quizzes and user data efficiently. Integrated database access using Spring Data JPA and Hibernate, ensuring reliable data management.

Designed RESTful backend supporting product and order management. Implemented CRUD APIs and database integration, improving data handling and system reliability. Optimized backend queries for smoother handling of multiple requests.

Created RESTful backend for managing job posts with Spring Boot. Implemented CRUD operations with PostgreSQL via Hibernate ORM for consistent data storage. Enhanced backend performance and maintainability through layered architecture.

Developed a full point-of-sale and inventory management system with Java and JavaFX. Implemented product management, sales processing, barcode search, and invoice generation. Designed a relational database with H2 and integrated it using Hibernate ORM. Enhanced usability with a responsive Ul with search and update operations.

projects.project_name: Brain Tumor Classification and Segmentation (Graduation Project)
projects.description: Developed a deep learning model to classify and segment brain tumors from MRI scans. Applied CNN and U-Net architectures using Python and medical imaging datasets.
Built an Al model to analyze and classify sentiment in movie reviews. Used natural language processing (NLP) techniques with Python and machine learning libraries.
Operating system memory management. Implementing kernel heap and user heap functions using C.
